Function# AudioHardwareCreateProcessTap(_:_:)

macOS 14.2+

```
func AudioHardwareCreateProcessTap(
    _ inDescription: CATapDescription!,
    _ outTapID: UnsafeMutablePointer<AudioObjectID>!
) -> OSStatus
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwarecreateprocesstap(_:_:)#parameters)

`inDescription`The CATapDescription that specifies how to build the Tap.

`outTapID`The AudioObjectID of the newly created Tap.

## [Return Value](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwarecreateprocesstap(_:_:)#return-value)

An OSStatus indicating success or failure.

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwarecreateprocesstap(_:_:)#discussion)

This routine creates a new Tap using the provided description.
